info.title: Provet Cloud REST API
info.description: Provet Cloud's REST API offers most of the key Provet data to be read or manipulated by other systems. It provides access to veterinary practice management data including patients, clients, consultations, appointments, invoices, prescriptions, and online booking.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of clients. Supports query filtering.

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing access token

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific client by ID.
Retrieve a paginated list of patients.

post.description: Create a new patient record associated with a client.

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific patient by ID.
Retrieve a paginated list of consultations. Supports filtering by complaint, admitted_time, department, client, patients.

parameters.name: admitted_time__gte
parameters.description: Filter by admitted time (greater than or equal)

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific consultation by ID.
Retrieve a paginated list of appointments.

parameters.name: start__gte
parameters.description: Filter by start time (greater than or equal)

post.description: Create a new appointment with scheduling details.

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific appointment by ID.

post.description: Create a client record for online booking associated with an appointment.
Create a patient record for online booking associated with an online booking client.
Send a confirmation notification for an appointment via email and/or SMS.
Create a reminder for an upcoming appointment.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of invoices.
Retrieve details of a specific invoice by ID.
Retrieve a paginated list of invoice line items.

post.description: Create a POS transaction, including payment links via Provet Pay.

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific prescription by ID.
Retrieve details of a specific prescription item by ID.
Retrieve a paginated list of departments.
Retrieve details of a specific department by ID.
Retrieve settings for departments.
Retrieve a paginated list of users.
Retrieve details of a specific user by ID.
Retrieve a paginated list of items/products.
Retrieve a paginated list of items within consultations.
Retrieve a list of available appointment reasons.

next.description: URL to the next result page

previous.description: URL to the previous result page

user.description: URI reference to the assigned user

request_hash.description: Hash identifying the appointment confirmation request

onlinebookingclient.description: URI reference to the online booking client

terminal_id.description: Terminal ID, set to 0 for payment links

payment_type.description: Payment type code (5003 for Provet Pay)

transaction_type.description: Transaction type code (4 for payment link)

creator.description: URI reference to the user creating the transaction

scopes.openid: Access to user details via OpenID

bearerAuth.description: OAuth 2.0 Bearer token. Access tokens are valid for 10 hours.
